The '''Republic troop carrier''' was used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] to deploy [[Rocket-Jumper Elite Advance Unit|Republic rocket-jumpers]] around the year [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]]. During the [[Second Battle of Onderon]], one such carrier bore the callsign ''[[Wing 4]]''.

{{Ship-stub}}
